displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: The Naturaverde Baby Delicatissimo Bath is ideal for daily cleansing and baby care from the very first baths. Its formula with softening and soothing properties makes it very delicate on children's skin and extremely tolerable. The Naturaverde Baby Delicatissimo Bath is enriched with oat and chamomile extracts from organic farming, free from aggressive foaming agents, parabens and dyes, to gently cleanse the skin of babies, ensuring hydration and protection at each bath.

Respects physiological pH .

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Our removable bath tub toy holders make it quick and convenient for moms to keep the kids bathroom organized. The extra large mouth on our bath tub toy organizer makes grabbing multiple toys quick and easy! With our bath tub toy holder, all you have to do is remove it from the main, and scoop up those toys. It's so easy, even the kids can use it! Complete with a large handle and built-in drain holes, our bath organizer can be used for washing your child's hair or to quickly scoop up all the floating toys. The holes in our bathtub toy holder allow the water to drain out to reduce mold and mildew, making it the perfect multi-use bathtub caddy. Not just the scoop, there are 4 dolphin shaped hook so that you could slot on any hanging accessories as you wish, as well as opening on both upper leg & head for better organizing for bottle like shampoo & more.

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: China

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool and dry place

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: 1 box consists of 5 packets of Baby Herbal Bath. Each packet contains 1 sachet. Our baby herbal bath helps baby with sensitive skins and jaundice issues.

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Singapore

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1)      Add in a sachet and 3 litres of water in a pot. Bring to Boil.
2)      Transfer the boiled water into a tub and add in another 3 litres of water.
3)      Make sure the water is lukewarm to prevent scalding baby.
4)      After using herbal bath, give baby a shower to rinse off the herbal water.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Keep in a cool and dry place, away from direct sunlight

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Mustela No-Rinse Soothing Cleansing Water thoroughly and gently cleans your baby's face, body and diaper area while also working to sooth very sensitive skin. Our micellar water dissolves dirt and impurities to cleanse skin like a baby wash without stripping your baby's skin of its natural oils. Our gentle fragrance-free formula is specifically designed for babies and newborns with very sensitive, rashy or reactive skin. Composed of 99% natural ingredients including Avocado Perseose, a natural ingredient designed specifically to help protect and hydrate your baby's delicate skin, and Schizandra, a berry extract that soothes tingling and tightness, while working to improve the skin's appearance.<

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: The Naturaverde Baby Delicatissimo Bath is ideal for daily cleansing and baby care from the very first baths. Its formula with softening and soothing properties makes it very delicate on children's skin and extremely tolerable. The Naturaverde Baby Delicatissimo Bath is enriched with oat and chamomile extracts from organic farming, free from aggressive foaming agents, parabens and dyes, to gently cleanse the skin of babies, ensuring hydration and protection at each bath.

Respects physiological pH .
